blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Bedtime Story Reading Streak (Parent + Child)
blue_ocean_niches.hypothesis: BO candidate — 7.2M+ community. 'Read to your child daily' is universal parenting advice. Zero dedicated streak app for parents. Closest: Duolingo (unrelated).

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Outdoor / Unstructured Play Streak for Kids
blue_ocean_niches.hypothesis: BO candidate — screen time concerns drive demand for outdoor tracking. No dedicated app for tracking daily outdoor play vs parental controls.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Cook-at-Home / No Takeout Streak
blue_ocean_niches.hypothesis: BO — eating out is expensive. 'Cook once a day' is a financial AND health goal. Zero dedicated cook-at-home streak app. Huge overlap: r/Frugal + r/EatCheapAndHealthy communities.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Fermentation / Sourdough Tending Streak
blue_ocean_niches.hypothesis: BO — fermentation is niche but highly engaged. Sourdough starter requires DAILY attention — natural streak mechanic. Zero dedicated app.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily CBT / Therapy Homework Exercise Streak
blue_ocean_niches.hypothesis: BO — therapists ASSIGN homework (thought records, exposure tasks). Zero app specifically for CBT exercise streaks. Gap between 'Woebot' (AI) and simple streak accountability.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Anger Management / Emotional Regulation Practice
blue_ocean_niches.hypothesis: BO — specialized niche. r/anger 200K, therapist-recommended exercises. Zero dedicated anger management streak app. High willingness-to-pay (medical adjacent).

blue_ocean_niches.label: No-Phone First Hour / Morning Digital Detox Streak
blue_ocean_niches.hypothesis: BO — 'no phone first hour' is viral self-help advice. r/nosurf 200K, r/digitalminimalism 430K. Irony: needs app to track not using app. But simple widget/shortcut could work.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Deep Work / Focus Block Completion Streak
blue_ocean_niches.hypothesis: BO — 'Deep Work' by Cal Newport. r/productivity 2M+. Forest/Focus apps track individual sessions. Gap: streak accountability for DAILY completion of X deep work blocks.
